revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Native name list/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Native name list/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Native name list/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Native name list/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Native name list/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Native name list/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Native name}} This template creates a correctly formatted list of native names. Typical uses would be the {{para|native name}} parameter common to many infoboxes. == Usage == Like {{tlx|native name}}, but this template takes only enumerated parameter names. {{para|tag''n''}} and {{para|name''n''}} are required, in pairs. Do not skip suffix numbers ({{para|1=tag1=.. |tag3=..}} {{nay}}). These parameters are: {{native name list |tag1 = |name1 = |italics1 = |paren1 = |parensize1= |nolink1 = |postfix1 = |tag2 = |name2 = |italics2 = |paren2 = |parensize2= |nolink2 = |postfix2 = }} {| class="wikitable sortable" ! scope="col" | Parameter name ! scope="col" | Description and examples ! scope="col" | Required |- ! scope="row" | {{para|tag{{var|n}}}} | The [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] code for the native language. French, for instance, is "fr"; Spanish is "es"; Arabic is "ar"; etc. | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|name{{var|n}}}} | The native name, in the native language (with accents, etc.). | yes |- ! scope="row" | {{para|italics{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|italic{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "off" or "no" to disable displaying the native name in italics. Example: {{para|italics{{var|n}}|off}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|paren{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|icon{{var|n}}}})}} | Set to "omit", "off" or "no" to suppress the appearance of the native language's name in a parenthesis after the native name. Example: {{para|paren{{var|n}}|omit}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|parensize{{var|n}}}}
{{smaller|(or {{para|fontsize{{var|n}}}})}} | Use to specify a font-size for the parenthesis. Per [[:en:MOS:FONTSIZE|MOS:FONTSIZE]], do not make this text smaller in infoboxes, since the text is already at 88% of normal. Example: {{para|parensize{{var|n}}|90%}} | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|nolink{{var|n}}}} | Set to anything (e.g. "on") to suppress the appearance of the native language's name as a link. | no |- ! scope="row" | {{para|postfix{{var|n}}}} | adds additional wikitext to list-item{{var|n}}; typical use might be references or for wikilinked 'language' name for those languages that do not have an IETF language tag; see examples | no |} == Examples == {| class="wikitable" ! scope="col" | Code ! scope="col" | Result |- | width="33%"|{{native name list |tag1=de |name1=Etsch |italics1=no |tag2=it |name2=Adige |tag3=vec |name3=Àdexe |parensize3=90% |tag4=rm |name4=Adisch |paren4=omit |tag5=lld |name5=Adesc |nolink5=yes}} |{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}} |- !colspan="2"|html |- |colspan="2"|{{code|lang=html|{{native name list |tag1=de|name1=Etsch|italics1=no |tag2=it|name2=Adige |tag3=vec|name3=Àdexe|parensize3=90% |tag4=rm|name4=Adisch|paren4=omit |tag5=lld|name5=Adesc|nolink5=yes}}}} |- |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |{{native name list |tag1=es|name1=Senda del Moro |tag2=mis|name2=Cuesta de Mr. Bourne |paren2=omit|postfix2= ([[Llanito]])}} |} ==Tracking category== {{Category link with count|Native name list template errors}} ==Template data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "tag1": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "example": "el, de", "type": "string", "required": true }, "name1": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "example": "ευρώ, herzlich willkommen", "type": "string", "required": true }, "italic1": { "aliases": [ "italics1" ], "label": "italics", "description": "\"off\" will prevent italicising the name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren1": { "label": "language name", "description": "Language name in parenthesis", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize1": { "label": "language fontsize", "description": "font-size of the language (parenthesised)", "example": "90%", "type": "number" }, "tag2": { "label": "language", "description": "language code", "type": "string" }, "name2": { "label": "name", "description": "Name in foreign language", "type": "string" }, "italic2": { "aliases": [ "italics2" ], "label": "italics", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "paren2": { "label": "language name", "type": "boolean", "default": "on" }, "parensize2": { "label": "language fontsize", "type": "number" } }, "description": "As {{native name}}, but with multiple name-language options" } ==See also== * [[:en:IETF language tag|IETF language tag]] list {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:Name templates]] [[Category:Language templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
